message:
style: cargo fmt sweep across indexer, pages, search, model

Pure rustfmt output — `git diff --ignore-all-space` on each file
is empty. Produced by running `cargo fmt` on this session's work
tree; the formatter's choices had oscillated enough across
recent commits that `cargo fmt --check` was red before this
sweep.

Files touched (each is a single-feature-area formatting pass):

- `src/indexer/mod.rs` — 3 multi-line expressions collapse
  back to one line (`lexical_packet_for_persist` signature,
  two `positional_indices_for_inserted` call sites) and one
  `std::fs::read_to_string(...).expect(...)` rewrap.

- `src/indexer/refresh_ledger.rs` — 3 multi-line bindings
  collapse back to one line (two `items_per_second_for(...)`
  call sites plus the `phase_record_with_items` helper
  signature) and one `assert!(!share.share_pct.is_nan(), ...)`
  inline.

- `src/model/cli_error_kind.rs` — one-liner import sort.

- `src/pages/key_management.rs` — a `.expect(...)` call
  collapses onto the same line as its .write_all.

- `src/pages/patterns.rs` — minor iterator-chain rewraps.

- `src/pages/wizard.rs` — 2024-edition `use` reordering
  (`anyhow::{Context, Result, bail}`, `console::{Term,
  style}`, etc.) so imports sort bracket-items alphabetically
  after the path component.

- `src/search/query.rs` — test-function signature collapses
  from the split `fn foo() -> Result<()>` form back to one
  line.

Grouped into a single commit because splitting one cargo-fmt
sweep per file just adds noise to `git log` without any blame
benefit — formatter output is mechanical and isomorphic to
itself.
EOF
)
